meta.title: VSON | Market Development
meta.description: Market entry support for Singapore companies entering Vietnam. MRA-eligible across all three pillars: business development, market set-up, and market promotion.

og.title: VSON | Market Development
og.description: Market entry support for Singapore companies entering Vietnam. MRA-eligible across all three pillars: business development, market set-up, and market promotion.

md_hero.heading:
Enter Vietnam
with confidence
and the right partner.
md_hero.sub: VSON helps Singapore companies navigate the Vietnamese market, from finding the right partners to setting up operations and building brand presence. MRA-eligible across all three pillars.
md_hero.referral: Not yet familiar with the MRA grant? We can connect you with our consultant network in Singapore.

mra.label: MRA Grant: Up to S$100,000, 70% Funded

services.heading:
Three services.
All three MRA pillars covered.

cards.title: Find Your Footing
cards.body: We identify the right distributors, JV partners, and logistics operators for your business in Vietnam and build the BD strategy to engage them.

cards.title: Set Up Right
cards.body: Through our partner network, we facilitate your incorporation, IP protection, and compliance so your Vietnam entity is built on solid ground.

cards.title: Get Known
cards.body: We run your market entry campaign in Vietnam, from trade introductions to brand visibility, using the same activation infrastructure we deploy for leading international brands.

why_vson.heading:
Five reasons to choose
VSON for Vietnam.
why_vson.body: We're not a consultancy that advises from a distance. We're an operating business in Vietnam, working in this market every single day.

items.title: On the Ground
items.body: Vietnam-registered, Vietnam-operating, not a remote advisory firm.

items.title: Both Sides of the Equation
items.body: We've built our own business here: distribution, partnerships, campaigns, operations.

items.title: A Network You Can Trust
items.body: Legal partners, distributors, logistics operators, and government-linked contacts.

items.title: MRA-Ready
items.body: We understand the grant framework, the documentation, and what EnterpriseSG expects.

items.title: Built for This Bridge
items.body: VSON - Việt Sing - was founded with one conviction: Vietnam and Singapore belong closer together.

steps.title: Explore
steps.body: We start with a conversation, understanding your business, your Vietnam goals, and your MRA eligibility. No commitment required.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: We map out your market entry plan across the three MRA pillars, identifying the right partners, set-up requirements, and promotion strategy.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.body: We execute across all three pillars (directly and through our partner network) while keeping your MRA documentation on track.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Once you're in market, we stay alongside you, connecting you to the next opportunity as your Vietnam presence matures.

primary.heading: Ready to explore Vietnam?
primary.body: Talk to our market development team. No obligation, just a conversation about what's possible.

secondary.body: Not yet familiar with the MRA grant? We'll connect you with our Singapore consultant network. They can advise on eligibility before we begin.

link.label: Connect me to the MRA network
